description: Send notifications to your own Amazon Chime destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise chime:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose your Amazon Chime incoming webhook URL from your stored secrets and POST a native Chime {Content} payload directly, bypassing Apprise.
name: msg-to-chime

request.template: {"urls":"chime://${ customer_secrets.CHIME_WEBHOOK_ID }/${ customer_secrets.CHIME_TOKEN }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"chime://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"Content":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}

gateway-plus.base_url: ${ customer_secrets.CHIME_WEBHOOK_BASE ?? https://hooks.chime.aws }/incomingwebhooks/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_id_secret }} }?token=${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }

request.template: {"Content":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
